caption: A man is seated at a desk in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the text "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering, and a gold chain. He is wearing black headphones and speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring a repeated logo with five gold stars and the text "URBAN HUSTLE," alongside a large red and white sign that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk sits a black mug with "BOSS TALK 101" printed on it and a black rectangular object. Across the sequence, the man maintains his position while his facial expression shifts slightly, moving from a closed-mouth smile to an open-mouthed expression as he continues speaking, while his head tilts subtly.
